Crystal.Avalonia
Table of Contents

Namespace Crystal.Avalonia

Classes

CrystalApplication

The base application class, extending Avalonia's Avalonia.Application. Provides the foundation for modular development and MVVM binding.

CrystalOptions

Provides global configuration options for the Crystal.Avalonia framework.

ModuleManager

Manages and initializes application modules. Automatically created and used by the framework during OnFrameworkInitializationCompleted().

MvvmManager

Manages View-to-ViewModel mapping and MVVM binding registration.

ViewModelLocator

Provides automatic ViewModel binding via an attached property. Works in conjunction with EnableViewModelLocator.

Interfaces

IModule

Defines an application module, which is a self-contained unit of functionality. Modules allow you to organize your application into independent feature areas, each managing its own services and views.

IModuleRegistrar

Provides module registration functionality. Used to register all functional modules during application startup.

Crystal.Avalonia © 2024
